name: EeveeSpotify
subtitle: Spotify Enhancement
description: This tweak makes Spotify think you have a Premium subscription, granting free listening, just like Spotilife, and provides some additional features like custom lyrics.

apps.name: EeveeSpotify
apps.subtitle: Spotify Premium Enhancement
apps.localizedDescription:
# Release Notes:

Improved :
- Support for Spotify 9.1.56
- LRCLIB lyrics

New Icons:
- EvilSpotify 
- SpotifyMonochrome
- Greenify
- Eevify
- SmallvileSpotify
- MikuSpotify
- SpotifyDarkBlue
- SpotifyDeepGreen
- SpotifyFrieren
- Supermanify

Patched vs Not Patched
Use patched if you use a paid cert or troll store

Use the non patched one for other methods like Sideloadly/Altstore/Sidestore

Credits for this update:

[Ryuk](https://github.com/faroukbmiled) 

[Mod4](https://github.com/M0d-4) 

[estrogencat](https://github.com/estrogencat)

TrollFools .zip by [iOSVN](https://t.me/ioscrackvn)

**Join [TG channel](https://t.me/compiledipas) to recieve news on developement**

**VIEW TXT FILE**
